pattern: Tree DFS: the total inform time equals the longest root-to-leaf path where edge weights are the informTime values.
hints: Build an adjacency list of subordinates for each manager, then DFS from headID.
At each node, the time to inform all employees in its subtree is informTime[node] plus the max over all children's subtree times.
The answer is the maximum cumulative time from the head to any leaf node.

edge_inputs.description: wide flat tree - all leaves same time
all inform times are zero except root
